mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_battle ( title, status, vote_limit_per_member, vote_only_yn, creator_member_seq, use_yn, create_id, create_ip, create_dt, modify_dt ) VALUES ( #{title}, 'OPEN', #{voteLimitPerMember}, #{voteOnlyYn}, #{creatorMemberSeq}, 'Y', #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), NOW() )
INSERT INTO event_battle_option (event_battle_seq, sort_order, label, points_total) VALUES (#{eventBattleSeq}, #{sortOrder}, #{label}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT e.event_battle_seq AS eventBattleSeq, e.title AS title, e.status AS status, e.vote_limit_per_member AS voteLimitPerMember, e.vote_only_yn AS voteOnlyYn, e.winner_option_seq AS winnerOptionSeq, wl.label AS winnerLabel, e.creator_member_seq AS creatorMemberSeq, c.member_id AS creatorMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.MEMBER_NAME), ''), c.MEMBER_ID) AS creatorDisplayName, COALESCE( CASE WHEN c.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', c.profile_image_file_seq) END, c.profile_image_url ) AS creatorProfileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(e.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(e.settle_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS settleDt FROM event_battle e INNER JOIN member c ON c.member_seq = e.creator_member_seq AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN event_battle_option wl ON wl.event_battle_option_seq = e.winner_option_seq WHERE e.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND e.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT event_battle_option_seq AS eventBattleOptionSeq, event_battle_seq AS eventBattleSeq, sort_order AS sortOrder, label AS label, points_total AS pointsTotal, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM event_battle_vote v WHERE v.event_battle_option_seq = event_battle_option.event_battle_option_seq) AS voteCount FROM event_battle_option WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT event_battle_option_seq AS eventBattleOptionSeq, event_battle_seq AS eventBattleSeq, sort_order AS sortOrder, label AS label, points_total AS pointsTotal FROM event_battle_option WHERE event_battle_option_seq = #{eventBattleOptionSeq}

SELECT e.event_battle_seq AS eventBattleSeq, e.title AS title, e.status AS status, e.vote_limit_per_member AS voteLimitPerMember, e.vote_only_yn AS voteOnlyYn, e.winner_option_seq AS winnerOptionSeq, wl.label AS winnerLabel, e.creator_member_seq AS creatorMemberSeq, c.member_id AS creatorMemberId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(c.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.MEMBER_NAME), ''), c.MEMBER_ID) AS creatorDisplayName, COALESCE( CASE WHEN c.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', c.profile_image_file_seq) END, c.profile_image_url ) AS creatorProfileImageUrl, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(o.label ORDER BY o.sort_order SEPARATOR ' · ') FROM event_battle_option o WHERE o.event_battle_seq = e.event_battle_seq) AS optionLabelsPreview, DATE_FORMAT(e.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(e.settle_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS settleDt FROM event_battle e INNER JOIN member c ON c.member_seq = e.creator_member_seq AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN event_battle_option wl ON wl.event_battle_option_seq = e.winner_option_seq
ORDER BY e.event_battle_seq DESC LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_battle_bet (event_battle_seq, event_battle_option_seq, member_seq, point_amount, create_dt) VALUES (#{eventBattleSeq}, #{eventBattleOptionSeq}, #{memberSeq}, #{pointAmount}, NOW())
INSERT INTO event_battle_vote (event_battle_seq, event_battle_option_seq, member_seq, create_dt) VALUES (#{eventBattleSeq}, #{eventBattleOptionSeq}, #{memberSeq}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT b.event_battle_option_seq AS eventBattleOptionSeq, MAX(o.label) AS label, SUM(b.point_amount) AS pointAmount FROM event_battle_bet b INNER JOIN event_battle_option o ON o.event_battle_option_seq = b.event_battle_option_seq WHERE b.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND b.member_seq = #{memberSeq} GROUP BY b.event_battle_option_seq LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM event_battle_bet WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_seq) FROM event_battle_bet WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq}
SELECT MAX(event_battle_bet_seq) FROM event_battle_bet WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq}

SELECT b.event_battle_bet_seq AS eventBattleBetSeq, b.member_seq AS memberSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(m.MEMBER_NAME), ''), m.MEMBER_ID) AS memberDisplayName, b.event_battle_option_seq AS eventBattleOptionSeq, o.label AS optionLabel, b.point_amount AS pointAmount, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM event_battle_bet b INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_seq = b.member_seq AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' INNER JOIN event_battle_option o ON b.event_battle_option_seq = o.event_battle_option_seq WHERE b.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND b.event_battle_bet_seq < #{beforeBetSeq} ORDER BY b.event_battle_bet_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.event_battle_bet_seq AS eventBattleBetSeq, b.member_seq AS memberSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(m.MEMBER_NAME), ''), m.MEMBER_ID) AS memberDisplayName, b.event_battle_option_seq AS eventBattleOptionSeq, o.label AS optionLabel, b.point_amount AS pointAmount, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM event_battle_bet b INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_seq = b.member_seq AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' INNER JOIN event_battle_option o ON o.event_battle_option_seq = b.event_battle_option_seq WHERE b.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND b.member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY b.event_battle_bet_seq DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.member_seq AS member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(m.MEMBER_NAME), ''), m.MEMBER_ID) AS member_display_name, SUM(b.point_amount) AS total_points, MAX(o.label) AS option_label FROM event_battle_bet b INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_seq = b.member_seq AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' INNER JOIN event_battle_option o ON b.event_battle_option_seq = o.event_battle_option_seq WHERE b.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} GROUP BY b.member_seq, m.NICKNAME, m.MEMBER_NAME, m.MEMBER_ID HAVING SUM(b.point_amount) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(b.point_amount) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT member_seq AS memberSeq, SUM(point_amount) AS stakeAmount FROM event_battle_bet WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND event_battle_option_seq = #{eventBattleOptionSeq} GROUP BY member_seq HAVING SUM(point_amount) > 0

SELECT b.member_seq AS memberSeq, SUM(b.point_amount) AS stakeAmount, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(m.NICKNAME), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(m.MEMBER_NAME), ''), m.MEMBER_ID) AS memberDisplayName FROM event_battle_bet b INNER JOIN member m ON m.member_seq = b.member_seq AND m.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE b.event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND b.event_battle_option_seq = #{eventBattleOptionSeq} GROUP BY b.member_seq, m.NICKNAME, m.MEMBER_NAME, m.MEMBER_ID HAVING SUM(b.point_amount) > 0 ORDER BY b.member_seq ASC
SELECT member_seq AS memberSeq, SUM(point_amount) AS stakeAmount FROM event_battle_bet WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} GROUP BY member_seq
mapper.update: UPDATE event_battle SET status = 'SETTLED', winner_option_seq = #{winnerOptionSeq}, settle_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND status = 'OPEN' AND use_yn = 'Y'

UPDATE event_battle SET status = 'CANCELLED', winner_option_seq = NULL, settle_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE event_battle_seq = #{eventBattleSeq} AND status = 'OPEN' AND use_yn = 'Y'
